templates.name: Standard Project
templates.description: A complete README with badges, table of contents, features, install, usage, contributing and license.

templates.name: Library / Package
templates.description: For an installable package: install, quick start, an API reference table and contributing notes.

templates.name: CLI Tool
templates.description: For a command-line tool: installation, usage, and tables of commands and options.

templates.name: Web App / Product
templates.description: For an app or product: live demo link, screenshot, feature checklist, tech stack and deployment.

templates.name: GitHub Profile
templates.description: A profile README (username/username repo) with intro, social badges, skills and stats card.

templates.name: Minimal
templates.description: A short, no-frills starting point: title, description, install, usage and license.
